INSTRUCTIONS

WASD move  ·  MOUSE look  ·  L-CLICK fire  ·  R-CLICK aim  ·  SHIFT sprint  ·  SPACE jump  ·  CTRL crouch  ·  SPRINT+C slide
R reload  ·  V melee (auto when dry)  ·  G throw grenade  ·  E use station / open cache  ·  1·2·3 / scroll weapons
ESC pause  ·  P open the in-game model/transform editor
Kill enemies for ◆ credits — spend them at the ammo station and supply caches.
🎮 Controller connected — L-stick move · R-stick look · RT fire · LT aim · A jump · X reload · Y use · B grenade · LB/RB weapons · L3 sprint · any button deploys   (press ` for controller test)
